landing.title: A Spatial Canvas for
landing.description: SpatialNotes combines the freedom of a digital canvas with the power of Hybrid E2EE security. Choose between seamless Standard notes or Zero-Knowledge E2EE vaults. Organize, draw, and write without boundaries or compromises.

features.title: Built for Deep Work
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed to keep you in the flow.

footer: SpatialNotes. All rights reserved. Zero-Knowledge. Open Source.
